english translation text:
7) Repeat the following
as many times as possible

arabic text: اَ للَّهُمَّ الْعَنْ قَتَلَةَ الْحُسَيْنِ وَاَصْحَابِهِ
english translation text: Oh Allah! Withhold Your mercy on those who killed Hussein (A.S.)

8) Repeat the following
as many times as possible

arabic text: فَیَا لَیْتَنِیْ کُنْتُ مَعَکُمْ فَاَفُوْزَ مَعَکُمْ فَوْزاً عَظِیْما
english translation text: If only I had been with You and had achieved a great success
